TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ecuador u Ecuador sa ilabu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 2 00 S, 77 30 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 283,561 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa izaw ku 276,841 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 6,720 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 16,080,778. kakalukan umah sa 29.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 38.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 31.40%. Ecuador masakaputay makumud a kanatal Spain a kamu: Rep√ļblica del Ecuador) pulung Ecuador , u naitida i Nan-mei-cul satip nu amisan namakaydaay i Cung-kul malimad muenen, saamisan sa micapi tu Columbia , nu timulan malitin tu Peru , capi i wali nu waliyu , atu Ci-li atu Nan-mei-cul caay katatepal tu Brazil , nu dumaan a niyadu' silaed tu Ecuador nu lala' idaw ku 1,000 kung-li i Cya-la-pa-ke a subal. :Rep√ļblica del Ecuador) . Ecuador i 1809 a mihcaan waluay idaw ku cacay bataan patukuh a miliyas tu Spain a nikuwanan masacacay sakelec ku nida sa patideng tu kanatal. ya u telekelal patelek tu Ecuador a kanatalan, sisa u Spain uyni u telekelal (ecuador) palu kanatal nu ngangan, zayhan kina kanatal idaw ku kasingangan han tu, hakya mahini yadah ku pada' kyu pangangan hantu tu "pada' a kanatal". u tatangahan a tusu i Pi-cing-ca u silamalay a buyu' u kitidaan kya buyu', namakay bayu nu telek katalakaw 2,850 a depah, sisa kina tusu u sakatusa katalakaw i kitakiay a tusu (mikilul tu i Pu-li-wya-ya a tusu nu La-pa-si ). (ecuador)šĹúÁāļŚúčŚźć,Śõ†ś≠§Ť©≤ŚúčcŚŹąśďĀśúČ"ŤĶ§ťĀďŚúč"ÁöĄŚą•Á®Ī, . tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Quito . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 10 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Len√≠n Moreno (LininÔľéMulyenuwa Śą©ŚĮß¬∑Ťéęťõ∑Ťęĺ ), 1953 a mihca 3 a bulad 19 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Ecuador ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 5 bulad 24 demiad. laylay u nu aydaay a laylay, u Ecuador a laylay taneng mikilim tu nu tulu a malebud lima a lasubu a mihcaan nu ayawan. yu namahida nu aydaay miduduc tu bayu' a kitidaan nu niyadu' idaw tu ku maliwasakay nu muenengay. i 1463 a mihcaan malu nu Inca a kanatal ku nikahida. i Spain makatepa tu baluhayay sa, u Ecuador i 1532 a mihcaan debungan nu Spain a tademaw, namahayda maselep tu ku Spain nu malimatay a tademaw i kitidaan pina tu hakya a lasubuan nu mihca. . 1809 a mihcaan walu a bataan idaw ku cacay a bataan misakamu a masacacay, nika kalankan maala aca nu Spain , misadakay tu pinaay tu nu mihcaan, 1822 a mihcaan kya u tatengaay tu miales tu Spain nipikuwan. 1825 a mihcaan milabu tu tabakiay a Columbia masakaputay mapulung a kanatal, nika kina kanatal i 1830 a mihcaan maliwasak. u Ecuador a masakaputay mapulung a kanatal kyu patideng. 1809ŚĻī8śúą10 . ya kanatal nanipatideng caay kacakad ku cen-ce nu Ecuador , u micudaday atu hitayay a nika kutakutay nu sihu makatukuh cacay idaw ku siwa, naw 1979 a mihcaan u tatengaay tu u micudaday a sihu ku mikuwanay, patideng tu hulic, hida han miyun tu tusa a bataan nu mihcaan. . 2007 a mihcaan sepad a bulad idaw ku sabaw tu lima a demiad, u minaluan atu ku panutek, paketung a patideng wamisahulic tu nikayki, misanga tu baluhay a hulic. 2019 a mihcaan enen a bulad idaw ku sabaw tusa, Ecuador u nu satalakaway a nipikikung paayaw tu tatayna atu tatayna tatama atu tatama mikikung a malacawa, u nipalucek tu cudad i 2019 a mihcaan pitu a bulad idaw ku walu a demiad u nipaayawen a nisulit u tatengaay tu kya nikalaacawa tu tatayna u tatayna atu tatama u tatama a malaacawaay tu pacudad. i 2019 a mihcaan cacay a bataan, Ecuador a sihu namilawpes tu sapadansu tu simal nu sapaaca katuud ku mikawanay, u sihu sa limaden ku tusu Ci-tul patayda i satabakiay a niyadu' i Kua-ya-ci-er misakawaw. 2019ŚĻī10śúą, . kitidaan Ecuador i Nan-mei-cul nu satipan a kanatal, micapi tu waliyu atu telekelal, kina telekelal (u kamu nu Spain :Ecuador) mibesul kina lala' nu kanatal, u nani Ecuador malu nu ngangan tu nu kanatal. Ecuador idaw kya kapahay a dahat nu liwliw, u lala' nu lanatal pangkiw i buyubuyuan ku 38% u kilakilangan amin, macapi tu tukus nu bayu i sawalian a kitidaan sa u masaenalay ku liwliw nu lala', u talakaw ya masawahulay nu buyu' salikeliked sa masabacabacal, idaw ku liken atu tabelacay a kulit salengac sa i An-ti-si a butu', u yu Ke-tul-pa-si u silamalay a buyu' i kitaki u satabakiay u satalakaway a silamalay a buyu'. u Ecuador yadah ku talawadaw u namakayda i timul miduduc saan militing i Peru . :Ecuador)ś©ęŤ≤ęŚÖ∂ŚúčŚúü,šĻÉšĽ•EcuadorÁāļŚúčŚźć. . kenis atu likut tu kanatal . Ecuador i satipan nu waliyu , idaw ku 2,237 km nu sadipasan, u ahebal nu lala' 283,561 km2. Ecuador nu saamisan atu Columbia laed malcapi (708 km) atu sawali nu timuan atu Peru malalidemuh tu (1,529 kun-li). Ecuador hamin u ahebal nu lala' 28 a mang 3,520 km2. pasu nu Ciya-la-pa-ke a subal. sikasan, u ahebal nu lala' 27 aman idaw ku 6,841 km2, u nanum nu ahebal 6,720 km2. i Nan-mei-cul , Ecuador u ahebal nu lala' kiahebalan ku Uruguay , Suriname , Guyana atu tungus nu France a Guyana . tusu Ecuador a tusu u sakatusa yadah ku tabakiay a tusu. u satabakiay a tusu i Kuwa-ya-ci-er . u dumaay sakahenulan nu tusu idaw ku Kun-ka , An-pa-tul , Pul-tu-wei-ye-hul , Ma-ca-la , Lul-ha . ,ť¶¨śü•śčČ,śīõŚďą. manamec Ecuador u matanengay ku nikaudip maka malingatuay a kanatal, u manamecay u milihidaay a simalay ku sakaudip, u sakatahkal nu malukay a tuud u sasazayliawan. 2000 a mihcaan kina kanatal micuduh tu nu Amilikay a kalisiw ku nipikuwan, namahida satu sa sikacacekin tu ku tademaw makai' tu nu aydaay a nipikakuwan kyu mapaales, nika malaheci tu nu Amilika a kalisiw midayli tu sangalep ku mahiniay u tung-ho-pun-cang u kasenengan nikacaay kacakad ku malumanay a kalisiw nu Su-ke-lei . Ecuador u salengacay nu hana u siwni Lan han kya hana nu kanatal, u palang a kakawsan nu An-ti-si a kanatal. . tademaw Ecuador a kanatal u ahebal nu lala' tusa idaw ku walu a mang tulu malebud lima lasubu idaw ku enan a bataan nu pin-hawan-kun-li, u tademaw 1522 amang 3680 ku tademaw (2011 a mihcaan a nasulitan), naw u Spain nu malimatay a tademaw, i labu nu tademaw yadah ku caayay kalecad, masanad ku Yin-O malamelay nu tademaw (May-se-ti-sul a tademaw , Mestizos) u tademaw hamin idaw ku 41%, u Indian a tademaw 34%, u salengacay a tademaw 15%, namahini satu idaw hen ku makay Africa pataydaen i Nan-mei-cul palakalungen kya tademawan u lumeniay a tademaw atu lumeniay salengacay u makungkuay tu tademaw. mahida tu nu La-tin-mei-cul katuuday a kanatal, Ecuador a nieneng u nipisinciya sa nu malamelay tu Indian a laylayan ku pasayda i tinsukiw, u tatangahan a kamu nu Spain , nika u Indian a binacadan u nu Ke-ciw-ya ku kamu. . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

ku nipikuwan, namańßida satu sa sika ¶a ¶…ôkin tu ku tad…ômaw makai Ē~ ° tu nu ajdaaj a nipikakuwan kju mapaar~…ĺ…ôs, nika mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw midajr~…ĺi tu saŇčar~…ĺ…ôp ku par~…ĺaŇč a kakawsan nu an-ti-si a kanatar~…ĺ. . tad…ômaw …ô ¶uador a kanatar~…ĺ u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tusa idaw ku war~…ĺu a maŇč tur~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbud r~…ĺima r~…ĺasubu idaw ku …ônan a bataan nu pin-ńßawan-kun-r~…ĺi, u tad…ômaw **** amaŇč **** ku tad…ômaw (**** a mińß ¶aan a nasur~…ĺitan), naw u spain nu mar~…ĺimataj a tad…ômaw, i r~…ĺabu nu tad…ômaw jadańß ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, masanad ku jin-o mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu tad…ômaw (maj-s…ô-ti-sur~…ĺ a tad…ômaw , m…ôstizos) u tad…ômaw ńßamin idaw ku **%, u indian a tad…ômaw **%, u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw **%, namańßini satu idaw ńß…ôn ku makaj afri ¶a patajda…ôn i nan-m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ par~…ĺakar~…ĺuŇč…ôn kja tad…ômawan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj u makuŇčkuaj tu tad…ômaw. mańßida tu nu r~…ĺa-tin-m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ katuudaj a kanatar~…ĺ, …ô ¶uador a ni…ôn…ôŇč u nipisin ¶ija sa nu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj tu indian a r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan ku pasajda i tinsukiw, u tataŇčańßan a kamu nu spain , nika u indian a bina ¶adan u nu k…ô- ¶iw-ja ku kamu. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Ecuador u Ecuador sa ilabu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 2 00 S, 77 30 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 283,561 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa izaw ku 276,841 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 6,720 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 16,080,778. kakalukan umah sa 29.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 38.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 31.40%. Ecuador masakaputay makumud a kanatal Spain a kamu: Rep√ļblica del Ecuador) pulung Ecuador , u naitida i Nan-mei-cul satip nu amisan namakaydaay i Cung-kul malimad muenen, saamisan sa micapi tu Columbia , nu timulan malitin tu Peru , capi i wali nu waliyu , atu Ci-li atu Nan-mei-cul caay katatepal tu Brazil , nu dumaan a niyadu' silaed tu Ecuador nu lala' idaw ku 1,000 kung-li i Cya-la-pa-ke a subal. :Rep√ļblica del Ecuador) . Ecuador i 1809 a mihcaan waluay idaw ku cacay bataan patukuh a miliyas tu Spain a nikuwanan masacacay sakelec ku nida sa patideng tu kanatal. ya u telekelal patelek tu Ecuador a kanatalan, sisa u Spain uyni u telekelal (ecuador) palu kanatal nu ngangan, zayhan kina kanatal idaw ku kasingangan han tu, hakya mahini yadah ku pada' kyu pangangan hantu tu "pada' a kanatal". u tatangahan a tusu i Pi-cing-ca u silamalay a buyu' u kitidaan kya buyu', namakay bayu nu telek katalakaw 2,850 a depah, sisa kina tusu u sakatusa katalakaw i kitakiay a tusu (mikilul tu i Pu-li-wya-ya a tusu nu La-pa-si ). (ecuador)šĹúÁāļŚúčŚźć,Śõ†ś≠§Ť©≤ŚúčcŚŹąśďĀśúČ"ŤĶ§ťĀďŚúč"ÁöĄŚą•Á®Ī, . tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Quito . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 10 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Len√≠n Moreno (LininÔľéMulyenuwa Śą©ŚĮß¬∑Ťéęťõ∑Ťęĺ ), 1953 a mihca 3 a bulad 19 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Ecuador ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 5 bulad 24 demiad. laylay u nu aydaay a laylay, u Ecuador a laylay taneng mikilim tu nu tulu a malebud lima a lasubu a mihcaan nu ayawan. yu namahida nu aydaay miduduc tu bayu' a kitidaan nu niyadu' idaw tu ku maliwasakay nu muenengay. i 1463 a mihcaan malu nu Inca a kanatal ku nikahida. i Spain makatepa tu baluhayay sa, u Ecuador i 1532 a mihcaan debungan nu Spain a tademaw, namahayda maselep tu ku Spain nu malimatay a tademaw i kitidaan pina tu hakya a lasubuan nu mihca. . 1809 a mihcaan walu a bataan idaw ku cacay a bataan misakamu a masacacay, nika kalankan maala aca nu Spain , misadakay tu pinaay tu nu mihcaan, 1822 a mihcaan kya u tatengaay tu miales tu Spain nipikuwan. 1825 a mihcaan milabu tu tabakiay a Columbia masakaputay mapulung a kanatal, nika kina kanatal i 1830 a mihcaan maliwasak. u Ecuador a masakaputay mapulung a kanatal kyu patideng. 1809ŚĻī8śúą10 . ya kanatal nanipatideng caay kacakad ku cen-ce nu Ecuador , u micudaday atu hitayay a nika kutakutay nu sihu makatukuh cacay idaw ku siwa, naw 1979 a mihcaan u tatengaay tu u micudaday a sihu ku mikuwanay, patideng tu hulic, hida han miyun tu tusa a bataan nu mihcaan. . 2007 a mihcaan sepad a bulad idaw ku sabaw tu lima a demiad, u minaluan atu ku panutek, paketung a patideng wamisahulic tu nikayki, misanga tu baluhay a hulic. 2019 a mihcaan enen a bulad idaw ku sabaw tusa, Ecuador u nu satalakaway a nipikikung paayaw tu tatayna atu tatayna tatama atu tatama mikikung a malacawa, u nipalucek tu cudad i 2019 a mihcaan pitu a bulad idaw ku walu a demiad u nipaayawen a nisulit u tatengaay tu kya nikalaacawa tu tatayna u tatayna atu tatama u tatama a malaacawaay tu pacudad. i 2019 a mihcaan cacay a bataan, Ecuador a sihu namilawpes tu sapadansu tu simal nu sapaaca katuud ku mikawanay, u sihu sa limaden ku tusu Ci-tul patayda i satabakiay a niyadu' i Kua-ya-ci-er misakawaw. 2019ŚĻī10śúą, . kitidaan Ecuador i Nan-mei-cul nu satipan a kanatal, micapi tu waliyu atu telekelal, kina telekelal (u kamu nu Spain :Ecuador) mibesul kina lala' nu kanatal, u nani Ecuador malu nu ngangan tu nu kanatal. Ecuador idaw kya kapahay a dahat nu liwliw, u lala' nu lanatal pangkiw i buyubuyuan ku 38% u kilakilangan amin, macapi tu tukus nu bayu i sawalian a kitidaan sa u masaenalay ku liwliw nu lala', u talakaw ya masawahulay nu buyu' salikeliked sa masabacabacal, idaw ku liken atu tabelacay a kulit salengac sa i An-ti-si a butu', u yu Ke-tul-pa-si u silamalay a buyu' i kitaki u satabakiay u satalakaway a silamalay a buyu'. u Ecuador yadah ku talawadaw u namakayda i timul miduduc saan militing i Peru . :Ecuador)ś©ęŤ≤ęŚÖ∂ŚúčŚúü,šĻÉšĽ•EcuadorÁāļŚúčŚźć. . kenis atu likut tu kanatal . Ecuador i satipan nu waliyu , idaw ku 2,237 km nu sadipasan, u ahebal nu lala' 283,561 km2. Ecuador nu saamisan atu Columbia laed malcapi (708 km) atu sawali nu timuan atu Peru malalidemuh tu (1,529 kun-li). Ecuador hamin u ahebal nu lala' 28 a mang 3,520 km2. pasu nu Ciya-la-pa-ke a subal. sikasan, u ahebal nu lala' 27 aman idaw ku 6,841 km2, u nanum nu ahebal 6,720 km2. i Nan-mei-cul , Ecuador u ahebal nu lala' kiahebalan ku Uruguay , Suriname , Guyana atu tungus nu France a Guyana . tusu Ecuador a tusu u sakatusa yadah ku tabakiay a tusu. u satabakiay a tusu i Kuwa-ya-ci-er . u dumaay sakahenulan nu tusu idaw ku Kun-ka , An-pa-tul , Pul-tu-wei-ye-hul , Ma-ca-la , Lul-ha . ,ť¶¨śü•śčČ,śīõŚďą. manamec Ecuador u matanengay ku nikaudip maka malingatuay a kanatal, u manamecay u milihidaay a simalay ku sakaudip, u sakatahkal nu malukay a tuud u sasazayliawan. 2000 a mihcaan kina kanatal micuduh tu nu Amilikay a kalisiw ku nipikuwan, namahida satu sa sikacacekin tu ku tademaw makai' tu nu aydaay a nipikakuwan kyu mapaales, nika malaheci tu nu Amilika a kalisiw midayli tu sangalep ku mahiniay u tung-ho-pun-cang u kasenengan nikacaay kacakad ku malumanay a kalisiw nu Su-ke-lei . Ecuador u salengacay nu hana u siwni Lan han kya hana nu kanatal, u palang a kakawsan nu An-ti-si a kanatal. . tademaw Ecuador a kanatal u ahebal nu lala' tusa idaw ku walu a mang tulu malebud lima lasubu idaw ku enan a bataan nu pin-hawan-kun-li, u tademaw 1522 amang 3680 ku tademaw (2011 a mihcaan a nasulitan), naw u Spain nu malimatay a tademaw, i labu nu tademaw yadah ku caayay kalecad, masanad ku Yin-O malamelay nu tademaw (May-se-ti-sul a tademaw , Mestizos) u tademaw hamin idaw ku 41%, u Indian a tademaw 34%, u salengacay a tademaw 15%, namahini satu idaw hen ku makay Africa pataydaen i Nan-mei-cul palakalungen kya tademawan u lumeniay a tademaw atu lumeniay salengacay u makungkuay tu tademaw. mahida tu nu La-tin-mei-cul katuuday a kanatal, Ecuador a nieneng u nipisinciya sa nu malamelay tu Indian a laylayan ku pasayda i tinsukiw, u tatangahan a kamu nu Spain , nika u Indian a binacadan u nu Ke-ciw-ya ku kamu. . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
